subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. 1904
subcodes.first_line: Whenever you see anyone who deviates to the extent of a needle's eye from the straight path of the Cause of God... In this Faith there are no hidden mysteries or esoteric allusions.
subcodes.first_line_orig: هر وقت دیدید کسی بقدر سر سوزنی از جاده مستقیم امرالله انحراف جست و به عنوان عبادت
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @avoidance of Covenant-Breakers, @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics, @multiple meanings; interpretations in scripture
